name: What's evidence I need for lung disease from factory work in West Valley City?
description: Medical reports, exposure records, expert link.[9]

mainEntity.name: What's evidence I need for lung disease from factory work in West Valley City?

acceptedAnswer.text: Medical reports, exposure records, expert link.[9]
acceptedAnswer.description: Chest x-rays, pulmonologist report tying to exposures, coworker statements, MSDS sheets.[9] Utah requires substantial work causation proof.[9] Key factors: (1) diagnostic tests; (2) exposure logs; (3) no smoking confounders; (4) expert opinion. Collect safety data now. Chain of custody for samples. Lawyer subpoenas records.
